title: The Journey That Changed Me
content: Years later, Olivia struggled to explain exactly why that particular journey felt different from all the others. The destinations themselves were not extraordinary, nor were the accommodations especially remarkable. What changed was her perspective. Traveling alone forced her to make decisions independently, solve problems confidently, and become comfortable with uncertainty. She discovered strengths she had not previously recognized in herself. Encounters with different cultures challenged assumptions she once considered obvious. By the time she returned home, the world had not changed dramatically, but she had. Looking back, Olivia understood that the most meaningful journeys transformed not only how people saw new places but also how they understood themselves.
